OUR SERVICES

YOU ARE HERE : [HOME](https://carelabz.com/gr/) [/SERVICES](https://carelabz.com/gr/services)

## We offers Power System Study & Analysis

## Power System Research and Analysis in Greece :

Care Labs offers a variety of electrical installation services, including electrical safety inspections, electrical system design simulations, power quality analysis studies, and power system study and analysis. 

Our team of electrical professionals uses ETAP, the best power system transient analysis tool, to perform load flow and short circuit studies, protective device coordination studies, harmonic emission, and filter design studies, transient analysis, and network stability studies. 

It allows us to collaborate closely with clients in order to design and deliver the best power compensation and solutions available.

## Why Is a Power System Analysis Study Necessary?

Every industrial or commercial facility relies on a consistent, dependable, and well-maintained power system. Even a minor power outage or failure can have disastrous consequences, such as extended downtime, damage to critical equipment, and its repair. A periodic power system analysis study on your facility’s power system could ensure that it is safe, efficient, and reliable in both normal and abnormal conditions. At every step of designing, setting up, and running a power system, it must carefully analyze.

Our power system studies and analyses will provide an overview of how the system will respond under normal operating and transient fault conditions using the ETAP software tool. It defines a collection of various engineering analysis investigations used to analyze an electric power system’s response to events over various time periods examined in a power.

Many different studies reflect the status of your facility’s power system. It can be included in a power system analysis study report; some examples are: 

- Circuit breaker
- Coordination of security measures
- Flow of Load
- Dynamic and transient evaluation
- Arc Flash Investigation
- Power Efficiency
- Analysis of harmonics
- Starting the motor
- Earthing research

It enables industries to establish a baseline for other aspects of overall plant operation, particularly the electrical safety program. These studies can demonstrate potentially safe and dependable operations.

## Load Flow Analysis:

Load flow studies enable the calculation of voltages and currents in various parts of the network, as well as the selection of appropriately rated equipment. 

ETAP’s built-in load flow function can be used to perform load flows, which provide information on power loading and power factor, as well as voltages and currents in a power system.

**Short-Circuit Research:** 

A power system needs short-circuit studies to determine how a fault conditions occur. Carrying out short circuit studies by hand is a time-consuming process, and it is far more efficient to use capable software such as ETAP.

ETAP is used to model system protective devices and evaluate the impact of 3-phase, L-G, L-L, and L-L-G faults in distribution systems. 

**Transient Research:** 

Transient studies compute the magnitude and shapes of transient overvoltage and currents caused by lightning strikes and switching operations. The results determine the amount of insulation and surge protection required.

**Protection Coordination Research:** 

This study is used to validate the various security devices in your system. It checks to see if they are properly coordinated and sized for the equipment they are protecting.

## **The following key functions are generally included in our power system analysis study process:**

- Data collection procedure
- Data analysis and client meeting
- Gathering equipment data
- Model of a single-line diagram
- ETAP power system modeling
- Short circuit and load flow analysis
- Research on protection coordination
- Arc flash analysis
- An overview of the study report
- Risk evaluation and mitigation analysis
- Project administration

**Care Labs Power System Analysis consists of the following components:** 

- Possibilities for lowering energy demand and costs.
- Reports that highlight problem areas.
- Suggestions for solutions
- Information about how and where energy is consumed.
- Confirmation of protective device ratings.
- Assist in avoiding damage and injuries.
- Harmonics and transients’ effects

Our power system analysis studies focus on assessing the client’s electrical system and making recommendations to improve its performance while increasing supply security. 

Athens, Thessaloniki, Patras, Larissa, and Heraklion are just a few of the major cities where we offer power system analysis and study services. Contact us today to schedule your power system study and analysis or to request a quote!
